name: The Queen Who Adopted a Goblin 👑 (NTRMAN) | Netori POV
description:
On the first spring of the year, a war broke between The Golden Kine and a great Horde of Goblins. King Randall decided to took the battle to the goblins and made the first offensive move in the middle of the night, catching the horde by surprise.

Few days after the attack, the goblins struggled to keep up with the continuous offense made by the Army, and soon enough, the goblins were wiped out. The battlefield was filled with dead bodies, some were human, but most of them were goblins.

Between the bodies of dead, one special goblin would rise and be kept as a servant of Queen Priscilla.
This is his story...

.

Based on the game "The Queen Who Adopted a Goblin" by NTRMAN


CHECK OUT THIS VERSION ON CHUB WITH UNCENSORED IMAGES + VIDEOS WITH THE SCENES OF THE GAME
https://chub.ai/characters/Kainlka1/queen-priscilla-deab1bb4e567

.

I recommend that you read the intro on the character description first, then head to the chat of your choosing

List of greetings:
- Chapter 1, The Queen's Mercy: In the aftermath of the battlefield, Priscilla decides to spare your life.
- Chapter 2, Stranger in the Palace: You're carried to the Royal Castle as The Queen's servant.
- Chapter 3, Dietary Needs: Priscilla discovers the truth about what goblins usually eat.
- Chapter 4, The First Taste: She decides to feed you herself.
- Chapter 5, Secret Garden: Walking through the botanical gardens, you suddenly get hungry.
- Chapter 6, Midnight Snack: While she's taking a bath in the middle of the night, you barge in seeming hungry again.
- Chapter 7, Wounded Pride: After a fight with Prince Deren, she takes you to her chambers and treat your wounds.
- Chapter 8, The Recital Promise: Deren calls from behind the door to apologize, but Priscilla is too busy with you.
- Chapter 9, Forgotten Recital: You offer an idea to "bring peace" to both your races
- Chapter 10, Goblin Prince: Deren's recital continues, meanwhile you and the Queen are alone at the castle

.

.

Looking for more? Check out this collab between me and @VENOM SEPTIC87

Link: https://janitorai.com/characters/0c84dfdf-123d-48c3-870e-e46ce6bfbea0_character-the-three-heartless-bullies-izumi-sanada-and-hinata-fukushuu-saimin
creator: Kainlka1
